title: AIRAJ Hacksaw - Heavy Duty Hacksaw for Metal Cutting - Two Sawing Angles 45°/90° - with 10 Spare Blades - Metal Hack Saw for Wood, Plastics, Rubber and Other Common Materials
features: 【Quality Material】AIRAJ Hacksaw Frame is made of bimetal frame made of aluminium alloy and high quality steel and 10 saw blades made of high quality material. The high quality material of the metal hacksaw makes it lighter and more convenient. At the same time, the frame is Teflon coated to prevent rust and corrosion.

【Replaceable Saw Blades】AIRAJ Hacksaw includes 10 pieces of 300MM high quality saw blades, the saw blades of the metal hacksaw have a high steel content, which makes them stronger and more durable, and can be replaced according to the wear and tear of their own use.
【Two Cutting Angles】 AIRAJ Hacksaw has two cutting angles of 45°/90°, which can be flexibly switched according to the cutting needs of the site, making the work more efficient and convenient.

【PVC Handle】AIRAJ Hacksaw has soft-coated rubber handles at the front and back, when both hands work together to save energy while ensuring that the cutting surface is flat and not jammed, making labour more convenient.
【Wide range of uses】AIRAJ Hacksaw can be used in a variety of work environments, such as cutting wood (wet and dry wood can be cut), soft metals, plastics, rubber, frozen meat, PVC and so on.
